MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXTRON CO.'s MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Extron is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling.
